Package org.rodinp.core.tests.relations

Class FakeConfigurationElement

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.tests.relations.FakeConfigurationElement
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IConfigurationElement
public class FakeConfigurationElement extends Object implements org.eclipse.core.runtime.IConfigurationElement
Fake implementation of a configuration element for testing purposes.

  • Constructor Details

    • FakeConfigurationElement

      public FakeConfigurationElement(String name, String[] attributeStrs, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IConfigurationElement[] children)
      Builds a fake configuration element from the given parameters.

      The given name would denote the XML tag of the configuration element.
      The attribute definition strings attributesStrs are given as an array of strings of the following shape : attributeId='value'.

      Parameters:
      name - the name of the configuration element
      attributeStrs - the array of attribute definitions
      children - the children configuration elements
